recipes.name: Activity roles — default
recipes.description: Auto-grant role for active members; remove after 14 days inactive.

recipes.name: Activity-roles dry-run
recipes.description: Detect-only — no roles granted/stripped while tuning.

recipes.name: Activity roles — strict
recipes.description: Tighter activity bar, shorter grace.

recipes.name: Tiered active/regular/legend
recipes.description: Adds 3-tier activity ladder.

recipes.name: AI-mod summarize pack
recipes.description: Wires summarize-thread + suggest-action together for fast triage.

recipes.name: AI tools — default
recipes.description: AI mod-tools enabled (categorize, summarize-thread, suggest-action).

recipes.name: Fact-check tool on
recipes.description: Enables the /factcheck mod tool.

recipes.name: Translate-only mode
recipes.description: Only the translate-message tool is enabled.

recipes.name: AI translate non-English to English in support
recipes.description: Detects the language of every message in #support; if it isn't English, posts a threaded English translation as a bot reply so volunteer responders can help. Translation is cached per (hash, lang) for 24h to keep AI cost down.

recipes.name: Auto-clean spam links via AI flag
recipes.description: Pre-classifies any link-bearing message with the AI module's safety classifier; on a high-confidence spam/scam verdict, deletes the message and DMs the user the reason. Mirrors what SCAM_LINK does for the known-scam list, but extends it to never-seen URLs.

recipes.name: Auto-pin mod-marked answers
recipes.description: When a moderator reacts to any message with a configured emoji (default 📌✅), the bot pins it AND uses the AI module to summarize the parent thread/question into a one-line tag added to the pin.

recipes.name: AI — community
recipes.description: Generous limits, image gen on, friendly tone.

recipes.name: AI-creative system prompt
recipes.description: Switches the bot to a brainstorm/creative tone.

recipes.name: Daily AI mod report card
recipes.description: Once a day, asks the AI module to grade the previous 24h of moderator activity (response times, action distribution, appeal outcomes, escalations) and posts a private report card per moderator with constructive feedback.

recipes.name: Daily mod digest with AI summary
recipes.description: Posts a once-a-day staff-only digest summarizing yesterday's moderation activity (warns, mutes, bans, top offenders, automod hits) with an AI-written executive summary at the top.

recipes.name: AI — default
recipes.description: AI assistant with safe defaults, rate limits, premium gating.

recipes.name: Image-gen on
recipes.description: Allow /imagine command (premium only by default).

recipes.name: Lower rate-limit
recipes.description: Tighter per-user calls/hour.

recipes.name: AI-mod system prompt
recipes.description: Adds an AI-moderator system prompt focused on consistency + warmth.

recipes.name: Personalized welcome via AI persona
recipes.description: On join, the AI persona crafts a 1–2 sentence personalized welcome based on the new member's public profile (Discord About Me, mutual servers count, account age) and the server's loaded persona. Falls back to the standard welcome pool on AI error.

recipes.name: AI — strict
recipes.description: Mods only, very low rate-limit, no images, hard PII redaction.

recipes.name: Summary-only mode
recipes.description: Disables /chat — only thread/channel summaries allowed.

recipes.name: AI-support system prompt
recipes.description: Adds an AI-support system prompt for help channels.

recipes.name: Anonymous AMA questions
recipes.description: Allow questions submitted without revealing the asker.

recipes.name: AMA — default
recipes.description: Standard AMA: panelists, queue moderation, scheduled start.

recipes.name: AMA — strict
recipes.description: All questions reviewed, anonymous off, panelist-only answers.

recipes.name: Thread per question
recipes.description: Each approved question becomes its own discussion thread.

recipes.name: Anniversary — default
recipes.description: Member-anniversary celebrations on join-date matches.

recipes.name: Anniversary image card
recipes.description: Generate an anniversary card (default off).

recipes.name: Antinuke — community
recipes.description: Light antinuke for friendly community servers. Catches catastrophic actions but stays out of staff's way.

recipes.name: Antinuke — default
recipes.description: Sensible Wick-style antinuke baseline. Armed, alerts to log channel, moderate thresholds, panic mode primed but not aggressive.

recipes.name: Federation enforcement on
recipes.description: Trust antinuke federation lookups for cross-server bans.

recipes.name: Minimum account age 30 days
recipes.description: Bumps the join filter so new accounts can't trip antinuke from privileged actions.

recipes.name: Panic mode — armed and ready
recipes.description: Toggles panic mode triggers and aggressive lockdown without touching the rest of antinuke config.

recipes.name: Ping flood — strict
recipes.description: Tight thresholds for ping-flood detection.

recipes.name: Quarantine — soft
recipes.description: Quarantined members keep read access but can't send/react/voice.

recipes.name: Aggressive rollback window
recipes.description: Wider rollback window covering channel/role/webhook destructive actions.

recipes.name: Antinuke — strict
recipes.description: Lockdown-grade antinuke for raid-prone or doxx-target servers. Aggressive thresholds, panic mode pre-armed, dual response required for dangerous actions.

recipes.name: Auto-apply approve/deny
recipes.description: When a reviewer hits Approve, the ban is lifted server-side.

recipes.name: Appeal captcha required
recipes.description: Adds captcha to the public appeal form.

recipes.name: Appeal portal — community
recipes.description: Friendly portal, generous limits, auto-apply on approve.

recipes.name: Appeal portal — default
recipes.description: Public appeal form, mods review, decisions logged.

recipes.name: Appeal portal — strict
recipes.description: One appeal per ban, captcha, 90-day cooldown, manual decision required.

recipes.name: Thread per appeal
recipes.description: Each appeal opens a private thread for staff discussion.

recipes.name: Applications — default
recipes.description: Generic application module: review channel + mod role + 3-question template.

recipes.name: Deny requires written reason
recipes.description: Mods must enter a reason on deny — sent to applicant by DM.

recipes.name: Allow edits before review
recipes.description: Applicants can edit answers until staff opens the review.

recipes.name: Applications — strict
recipes.description: One open application at a time, long cooldown, deny requires reason.

recipes.name: Archive old threads
recipes.description: Daily sweep that archives threads with no activity in 30d.

recipes.name: Automations — default
recipes.description: Module on, per-automation rate limit, audit log integration.

recipes.name: Link presence to colour
recipes.description: Switches a member's color role based on their online/idle/dnd presence.

recipes.name: Log bans to channel
recipes.description: Mirrors every ban to a logging channel.

recipes.name: Mute on evader-detect
recipes.description: Auto-quarantines members flagged by evader-detection.

recipes.name: Role on boost
recipes.description: Grants a thank-you role when a member starts boosting.

recipes.name: Weekly mod rotation
recipes.description: Rotates an 'on-call' mod role each Monday.

recipes.name: Welcome DM after 24h
recipes.description: DMs the new member 24h after they join if they haven't sent a message.

recipes.name: Aggressive raid filter
recipes.description: Hair-trigger pack for servers under active raid pressure. Designed to be enabled during a raid window (paired with the raid module's auto-enable hook), not as an everyday baseline. Expect some false positives.

recipes.name: Anti-caps pack
recipes.description: Removes messages that are mostly uppercase past a length threshold.

recipes.name: Anti-emoji-spam pack
recipes.description: Trims emoji-only / emoji-flood messages.

recipes.name: Anti-invite pack
recipes.description: Blocks Discord invite URLs in any channel.

recipes.name: Anti-link pack
recipes.description: Blocks all external links except a small allowlist (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GitHub).

recipes.name: Anti-mention pack
recipes.description: Stops mention storms — bans members who mention 4+ unique users at once.

recipes.name: Antinuke locked-down preset
recipes.description: Maximum-paranoia preset for high-value or high-risk servers (large communities, brand servers, partnered servers). Pair with the antinuke module's full lockdown profile — this covers the message-side rules. Every customizable string is exposed as a placeholder.

recipes.name: Appeal portal with 3-strike escalation
recipes.description: Three-strike escalation rules wired to the standard moderation point system. Each strike level escalates: 5pts = warn, 15pts = 6h timeout, 30pts = ban with appeal link. Pair with a forms-based appeal portal (see forms/appeal-portal.json).

recipes.name: Automod — community
recipes.description: Light-touch automod for friendly chat servers — only the worst offenders trigger removal.

recipes.name: Community safe
recipes.description: Balanced safety pack for general-purpose communities. Keeps spam, scam links, invites, and slurs under control without over-moderating normal chat.

recipes.name: Automod — default
recipes.description: Balanced ruleset for general communities — invite/scam/cap/mention guards.

recipes.name: Family-safe
recipes.description: Strictest pack: aggressive on slurs, swearing, NSFW links, invites, and external links. For all-ages communities, kids' gaming servers, school clubs.

recipes.name: Gaming server
recipes.description: Balanced moderation for a 1k–50k member gaming community: tolerant of memes + caps, strict on slurs + invite spam.

recipes.name: Leetspeak slur pack
recipes.description: Wildcard slur detection that survives common leetspeak substitutions. Operator must fill in the blacklist.

recipes.name: Raid shield
recipes.description: Heavy anti-spam pack designed for servers facing active raids. Pair with the Modly raid module for join-burst protection — this covers the message-side.

recipes.name: Repeat-spam pack
recipes.description: Catches users sending the same message in a tight window.

recipes.name: Scam-link pack
recipes.description: Auto-bans on detected scam URLs (Discord/Steam/Crypto phishing patterns).

recipes.name: Slow-build trust verification
recipes.description: Three-tier trust ramp: brand-new accounts get heavy filters, established members (24h+) get baseline, trusted role gets a relaxed pack. Each rule is scoped by role so you can layer them. Apply the role gates in your role-picker / verification flow.

recipes.name: Slur + slur-leetspeak automod baseline
recipes.description: Drop-in slur baseline that combines the third-tier WORD_BLACKLIST wildcard layer with a regex pattern catching common leetspeak / look-alike obfuscations. Add your own server-specific terms in the placeholders before importing — the defaults are intentionally tame, generic stand-ins.

recipes.name: Streamer chat
recipes.description: Lighter-touch pack for creator communities. More tolerant of hype, but still clamps down on spam, slurs, and promotion.

recipes.name: Automod — strict
recipes.description: Locked-down ruleset for raid-prone or NSFW-adjacent servers.

recipes.name: Study / focus server
recipes.description: Strict pack for tutoring, homework help, or focus communities. Aggressive on off-topic + caps + mass-emoji.

recipes.name: Birthday greetings
recipes.description: Reacts to messages mentioning birthdays.

recipes.name: Autoresponders — default
recipes.description: Module on; per-trigger cooldown; reply-mode default.

recipes.name: Rules acknowledgement
recipes.description: Reacts when members say they read the rules.

recipes.name: Support FAQ autoresponders
recipes.description: Auto-pings the support FAQ when common questions are asked.

recipes.name: Thanks autoresponders
recipes.description: Friendly auto-replies on 'thanks/ty/thx' patterns.

recipes.name: Welcome-back set
recipes.description: Greets returning members.

recipes.name: Birthday role 48h
recipes.description: Birthday role lingers for 48h instead of 24h.

recipes.name: Birthday auto-shoutout
recipes.description: Daily check (09:00 server time) for any opted-in members whose birthday matches today; posts a shoutout in #general and assigns a 24h Birthday role with a custom color.

recipes.name: Birthdays — community
recipes.description: Warm style with reminder + embed + multi-day window.

recipes.name: Birthdays — default
recipes.description: Daily birthday announce in #general, role for the day.

recipes.name: 1-day-ahead reminder
recipes.description: Pings staff/community 1 day before each birthday.

recipes.name: Captcha — community
recipes.description: Friendly button-press captcha, generous timeout, no kicks.

recipes.name: Captcha — default
recipes.description: Standard image+button captcha on join, 5-minute deadline.

recipes.name: DM fallback on locked channels
recipes.description: If verify channel is unavailable, captcha is delivered via DM.

recipes.name: Switch to hCaptcha
recipes.description: Upgrades from image to hCaptcha challenge.

recipes.name: Kick on captcha timeout
recipes.description: Members who don't solve within the deadline are kicked.

recipes.name: Captcha + min account age 14d
recipes.description: Adds a 14-day account age floor on top of captcha.

recipes.name: Force reverify on rejoin
recipes.description: Returning members re-run captcha (good after a raid).

recipes.name: Captcha — strict
recipes.description: Hardened captcha for raid-prone servers: kick on timeout, ban on fail, hCaptcha + risk score.

recipes.name: Count-channel only
recipes.description: Only the count-to-X channel game is active.

recipes.name: Channel games — default
recipes.description: Long-running channel games (count-to-100, word-chain, etc).

recipes.name: Channel utils — default
recipes.description: Slowmode helpers + auto-purge windows.

recipes.name: Auto-purge #spam weekly
recipes.description: Cleans the spam channel weekly.

recipes.name: Color of the day — default
recipes.description: Rotates a colour role daily through a 7-colour palette.

recipes.name: Link presence to color
recipes.description: Links member's Discord presence (online/idle/dnd) to a colour role tier.

recipes.name: Neon palette
recipes.description: Switches to high-contrast neon colours.

recipes.name: Pastel palette
recipes.description: Switches to a soft pastel palette.

recipes.name: Command access — default
recipes.description: Standard role-gated commands map.

recipes.name: Trial mod pack
recipes.description: Restricts heavy commands to senior mods only.

recipes.name: Confessions — default
recipes.description: Anonymous confessions with mod review queue.

recipes.name: Min account 30 days
recipes.description: Block confessions from accounts <30 days old.

recipes.name: Mod review queue
recipes.description: Sends each confession to staff for approve/deny first.

recipes.name: Confessions — strict
recipes.description: All confessions queue, banned-words list active, image attachments off.

recipes.name: Counters — default
recipes.description: Voice-channel counters: total members, online, boosters.

recipes.name: Member-count counter
recipes.description: Only the member-count voice channel.

recipes.name: Appeal-help command set
recipes.description: Adds /appeal /appeal-status /appeal-rules.

recipes.name: Custom commands — default
recipes.description: Module enabled, mods can author, slash + chat triggers on, cooldown 5s.

recipes.name: faq pack
recipes.description: Generic 5-command FAQ pack. Edit the responses after import to match your server.

recipes.name: rules
recipes.description: Quick reply with a link to the rules channel.

recipes.name: FAQ command set
recipes.description: Adds /faq /faq-perms /faq-roles /faq-staff and similar.

recipes.name: Mod toolkit set
recipes.description: Mod-only quick-actions: /modping /modnote /escalate.

recipes.name: Rules command set
recipes.description: Adds /rules /rule-1 ... /rule-10 commands referencing the rules channel.

recipes.name: Server-info command set
recipes.description: Adds /serverinfo /partners /donate /links commands.

recipes.name: Welcome trigger set
recipes.description: Custom commands wired to welcome events: /howdy /greet /intro etc.

recipes.name: Discovery — default
recipes.description: Public discovery card with default tags.

recipes.name: Discovery tags — gaming
recipes.description: Tags the server as gaming/casual.

recipes.name: Discovery tags — tech
recipes.description: Tags the server as tech/dev/programming.

recipes.name: Economy — casino
recipes.description: Gambling on, big amounts, transfer tax to the house.

recipes.name: Economy — community
recipes.description: No gambling, light economy, big leaderboard.

recipes.name: Economy — default
recipes.description: Standard economy: daily, work, gambling off, leaderboard on.

recipes.name: Gambling on
recipes.description: Enables blackjack/slots/roulette betting.

recipes.name: Shop on
recipes.description: Enables the /shop command.

recipes.name: Steal on
recipes.description: Enables /steal — players can grief each other for funds.

recipes.name: announcement-banner
recipes.description: Clean announcement template for changelogs, events, and launches.

recipes.name: Embed builder — default
recipes.description: Embed builder enabled for mods + version history.

recipes.name: helpdesk-card
recipes.description: Support-oriented embed template for tickets, FAQs, and internal ops.

recipes.name: role-picker
recipes.description: Self-assign roles message. Pair with Modly's reaction-roles or button-roles module — this is just the prompt embed.

recipes.name: server-rules
recipes.description: Generic server-rules embed with placeholder fields. Edit fields after import.

recipes.name: server-tour
recipes.description: Multi-embed onboarding tour. Pin in #welcome or post once new members can see it. Replace channel IDs after import.

recipes.name: Versioning on
recipes.description: Stores edit history for each embed.

recipes.name: welcome-card
recipes.description: Friendly welcome embed referencing channels with placeholder mentions.

recipes.name: Auto-ban high-score evaders
recipes.description: When fingerprint score >= 0.8, ban immediately.

recipes.name: Evader detection — community
recipes.description: Quiet alerts only, no auto-bans, longer lookback for chronic raiders.

recipes.name: Evader detection — default
recipes.description: Watches for ban-evasion signals (alts, fingerprints, IP-like patterns).

recipes.name: Federation sync on
recipes.description: Share evader signals with federated antinuke peers.

recipes.name: Evader detection — strict
recipes.description: Auto-bans suspected ban-evaders above score threshold.

recipes.name: Tight username similarity
recipes.description: Catch alts using slight username variants (e.g. 'mike' vs 'mike1').

recipes.name: Ban appeal form (extended)
recipes.description: Long-form ban appeal — separate from appeal-portal for one-off custom flows.

recipes.name: Bug report form
recipes.description: Players-vs-product style bug report; routes to dev channel.

recipes.name: Forms — default
recipes.description: Forms module enabled with sensible defaults.

recipes.name: Partner application
recipes.description: Brief form for partner-server outreach.

recipes.name: Server feedback form
recipes.description: Anonymous-friendly community feedback for owners.

recipes.name: Staff application — detailed
recipes.description: 5-question staff app: experience, timezone, references, conflict scenario, why-us.

recipes.name: Fun — default
recipes.description: Standard fun module: 8ball, dice, coin, ascii art.

recipes.name: Fun — minimal
recipes.description: Only 8ball + coin + dice. Quiet servers.

recipes.name: 30-second cooldown
recipes.description: Bumps fun cooldown.

recipes.name: Games — casino
recipes.description: Betting + economy hooks active. Large pots.

recipes.name: Restrict to #games
recipes.description: Only allow game commands in the dedicated games channel.

recipes.name: Games — community
recipes.description: All non-betting games, no cooldown stress, daily mini-game on.

recipes.name: Daily mini-game
recipes.description: Posts a daily auto-trivia in #daily-game.

recipes.name: Games — default
recipes.description: Standard games loadout: trivia, hangman, blackjack, slots, tic-tac-toe.

recipes.name: Trivia-only loadout
recipes.description: Restrict games module to trivia only.

recipes.name: GitHub activity — compact
recipes.description: Single-line summaries instead of full embeds. Less noise.

recipes.name: GitHub activity — default
recipes.description: Posts repo events (push, PR, issue, release) into a dev channel.

recipes.name: GitHub PR digest in #engineering
recipes.description: Webhook receiver that batches GitHub PR events (opened, ready-for-review, merged, closed) into a single digest message updated in place every 5 minutes. Cuts out the per-event spam from the official GitHub bot.

recipes.name: PR firehose
recipes.description: All PR events including comments + review.

recipes.name: Releases only
recipes.description: Quiet mode — only release events.

recipes.name: Booster bonus entries x3
recipes.description: Boosters automatically get 3 entries.

recipes.name: Giveaways — community
recipes.description: Generous: bonus entries for boosters/regulars, multi-winner.

recipes.name: Custom-role rotation
recipes.description: Monthly custom-role giveaway — winner gets a personal vanity role.

recipes.name: Giveaways — default
recipes.description: Standard 24h giveaways, role gating, reroll allowed.

recipes.name: Item-grant template
recipes.description: Generic 'enter to win' card — operator fills prize text.

recipes.name: launch giveaway
recipes.description: Starter giveaway pack for launches or seasonal events.

recipes.name: Min account age 30d
recipes.description: Brand-new accounts blocked from giveaways.

recipes.name: Nitro giveaway rotation
recipes.description: Weekly Nitro giveaway template — 168h duration, single winner.

recipes.name: Giveaways — strict
recipes.description: Booster-only entry, account-age floor, single winner only.

recipes.name: Highlights — default
recipes.description: Personal-keyword DM highlights with cooldown.

recipes.name: Allow 25 keywords
recipes.description: Bumps per-user keyword cap to 25.

recipes.name: 30-min cooldown
recipes.description: Tighter cooldown to reduce notification spam.

recipes.name: Honeypot — default
recipes.description: Standard honeypot channel: any message earns a ban.

recipes.name: Delete 7 days of messages on hit
recipes.description: Cleans up past spam from the offender.

recipes.name: Honeypot dry-run
recipes.description: Detect-only — log hits but take no action.

recipes.name: Honeypot exempt mods
recipes.description: Whitelists the mod role so test messages don't trigger.

recipes.name: Honeypot kick mode
recipes.description: Honeypot kicks instead of banning.

recipes.name: Honeypot — strict
recipes.description: Honeypot + 7-day deletion window + DM owner.

recipes.name: Honeypot warn-only
recipes.description: Honeypot triggers a warn instead of a ban — good while tuning.

recipes.name: Anti-farm strict
recipes.description: Tightens duplicate detection + burst freeze.

recipes.name: Channel multipliers preset
recipes.description: Doubles XP in event channel, halves it in spam channel.

recipes.name: Inactive XP decay
recipes.description: Decays XP 5%/week after 14 inactive days.

recipes.name: Leveling — default
recipes.description: Standard XP rates with text + voice XP, level-up announce in-channel.

recipes.name: Disable reaction XP
recipes.description: Reactions don't grant XP — useful in raidy servers.

recipes.name: Leveling — strict
recipes.description: Slow XP, anti-farm aggressive, no reaction XP, decay on.

recipes.name: Weekend XP boost x2
recipes.description: Doubles XP on Saturday/Sunday.

recipes.name: Weekly leveling spotlight
recipes.description: Every Monday, posts a recap of the top 5 climbers on the XP leaderboard from the past 7 days. Awards a temporary VIP role to #1 for a week and an emoji to top 3.

recipes.name: Leveling — XP grind
recipes.description: Fast XP with weekend boost and reaction XP for hype servers.

recipes.name: Member notes — default
recipes.description: Mod-only notes attached to members; private, exportable.

recipes.name: Private — no export
recipes.description: Locks notes to in-app viewing only.

recipes.name: Praise notes pack
recipes.description: Adds 'praise' / 'great-help' / 'helpful' tags + DM on praise.

recipes.name: Member notes — audit
recipes.description: Tighter retention, federation share on, audit log on every read.

recipes.name: Watch-list pack
recipes.description: Adds a sticky 'watch' tag that surfaces on every mod-coach review.

recipes.name: Auto-apply on >0.95 confidence
recipes.description: Lets the coach quietly action obvious cases without staff approval.

recipes.name: Mod-Coach — community
recipes.description: Friendly coaching tone, weekly digest only, no auto-apply.

recipes.name: Mod-Coach — default
recipes.description: AI mod-coach gives staff suggested actions on edge-case incidents.

recipes.name: Mod-Coach — strict
recipes.description: Stricter rubric, lower auto-apply threshold disabled, all suggestions logged.

recipes.name: Tone feedback for staff
recipes.description: Highlights overly harsh or sarcastic mod replies in DM.

recipes.name: Weekly mod review digest
recipes.description: Ships a weekly recap of mod actions + suggestions for retro.

recipes.name: Auto-escalate at 10 points
recipes.description: Auto-timeout members who hit 10 warn-points within decay window.

recipes.name: Ban delete 7 days
recipes.description: Default `/ban` deletes 7 days of past messages.

recipes.name: Moderation — community
recipes.description: Friendly mod stance: short timeouts, fast warn decay, no auto-escalation.

recipes.name: Moderation — default
recipes.description: Standard mod-action defaults: warn-points expire, auto-escalate, mod-log on.

recipes.name: Silent moderation mode
recipes.description: Don't DM offenders — quietly action them.

recipes.name: Moderation — strict
recipes.description: Faster escalation, longer timeouts, harder ban deletes.

recipes.name: Save mod transcripts
recipes.description: Saves a transcript of each mod-action thread for future appeal.

recipes.name: Onboarding — default
recipes.description: Multi-step onboarding flow: rules ack, role-picker, intro post.

recipes.name: Intro post requirement
recipes.description: Add an introduction post to onboarding flow.

recipes.name: Kick after 72h incomplete
recipes.description: Kicks members who don't finish onboarding within 72h.

recipes.name: Rules-ack step
recipes.description: Adds a rules-acknowledgement step to onboarding.

recipes.name: Onboarding — strict
recipes.description: Hard-gate everything until onboarding completed, kick on timeout.

recipes.name: Personas — default
recipes.description: Bot personas: switchable per-channel tone (formal/casual/hype).

recipes.name: Playful host persona
recipes.description: Adds an upbeat playful-host persona for hangout channels.

recipes.name: Study-coach persona
recipes.description: Adds a calm, structured study-coach persona for #study channels.

recipes.name: Tech-mentor persona
recipes.description: Adds a senior-engineer-mentor persona for #help / #dev.

recipes.name: Warm host persona
recipes.description: Adds a warm community-host persona prompt.

recipes.name: Anonymous polls
recipes.description: Voter identity hidden from poll author.

recipes.name: Polls — community
recipes.description: Anonymous + multi-choice + thread discussion enabled.

recipes.name: Polls — default
recipes.description: Slash-command polls, default 24h, anonymous off.

recipes.name: Multiple-choice polls
recipes.description: Voters can pick more than one option.

recipes.name: Thread discussion per poll
recipes.description: Each poll spawns a discussion thread.

recipes.name: Captcha on raid trip
recipes.description: When a raid trips, force every joiner through captcha until cleared.

recipes.name: Raid shield — community
recipes.description: Light raid filter that won't false-positive on event drops.

recipes.name: Raid shield — default
recipes.description: Reasonable raid-detection thresholds with quarantine on trip.

recipes.name: Raid dry-run mode
recipes.description: Detect but never act — useful while tuning thresholds.

recipes.name: Fingerprint + avatar-hash ban
recipes.description: Enables avatar/device-fingerprint matching when banning raiders.

recipes.name: Lock channels on raid trip
recipes.description: When a raid trips, lock @everyone send permission across all configured channels.

recipes.name: Block accounts <90 days old
recipes.description: Hard block on very new accounts during active raid.

recipes.name: Raid shield — strict
recipes.description: Aggressive thresholds for servers being actively attacked.

recipes.name: Username pattern bans
recipes.description: Auto-bans joiners whose username matches a known raid signature.

recipes.name: Relay — default
recipes.description: Cross-channel relay setup with thread-per-source.

recipes.name: Discord ↔ Slack incident relay
recipes.description: Bidirectional bridge between #incidents on Discord and #incidents on Slack. Threads on either side stay synced; @here / @channel mentions are translated. Designed for shared on-call between an open community (Discord) and a paid Slack workspace.

recipes.name: Guild-pair mirror
recipes.description: Two-way mirror between a sister-guild's channel and ours.

recipes.name: Incident relay
recipes.description: Relay between #incidents and a private staff thread.

recipes.name: Anti-rep-farm
recipes.description: Adds reciprocal-rep + farm freeze detection.

recipes.name: Rep — default
recipes.description: Reputation system on with daily cap, no negative rep.

recipes.name: Allow negative rep
recipes.description: Members can `-rep` annoying people.

recipes.name: Rep — strict
recipes.description: Tight cooldowns, mutual-thread requirement, farm-freeze.

recipes.name: Booster perks cascade
recipes.description: When booster role is granted/removed, cascade booster-only perks roles.

recipes.name: Role events — default
recipes.description: Triggers when staff/booster roles are added/removed.

recipes.name: Staff promotion log
recipes.description: Logs role-grant events for any staff role.

recipes.name: Colour roles pack
recipes.description: Adds a color-of-the-day-style picker for cosmetic colour roles.

recipes.name: Roles — default
recipes.description: Role-picker module: button menus, max 1 colour role, mod can edit.

recipes.name: Interest roles pack
recipes.description: Adds a 'pick your interests' menu.

recipes.name: Ping roles pack
recipes.description: Adds opt-in event/announcement ping roles.

recipes.name: Pronoun roles pack
recipes.description: Adds he/she/they/ask roles via dropdown.

recipes.name: Safety — community
recipes.description: Light safety: keep PII detection on, NSFW soft-warn only.

recipes.name: Safety — default
recipes.description: Member safety baseline: doxx detection, NSFW image scan, link blacklists.

recipes.name: Doxx detection on
recipes.description: Auto-detect home-address / phone / email leaks and remove.

recipes.name: Member report channel
recipes.description: Adds a /report command targeting a private safety channel.

recipes.name: Safety — strict
recipes.description: Strict NSFW and PII enforcement for SFW-only servers and minor-friendly communities.

recipes.name: Suicide-prevention response
recipes.description: Detects crisis-language and DMs the user a localized hotline link.

recipes.name: Scheduled actions — default
recipes.description: Cron + one-shot scheduled actions, mod-editable, audit on.

recipes.name: Midnight purge of #spam
recipes.description: Auto-purges the #spam channel every midnight.

recipes.name: Monday recap pack
recipes.description: Posts a weekly recap every Monday morning.

recipes.name: Saturday event ping
recipes.description: Pings event role every Saturday afternoon.

recipes.name: Server anniversary
recipes.description: Auto-celebrate the server's creation date each year.

recipes.name: Server goals — default
recipes.description: Member-count milestones with announcements.

recipes.name: Milestone image card
recipes.description: Generate an image card on every milestone hit.

recipes.name: Server stats — default
recipes.description: Daily/weekly server stats digest in a private channel.

recipes.name: Weekly digest only
recipes.description: Disables daily, keeps weekly.

recipes.name: Smart channels — default
recipes.description: Auto-create temp voice/text channels on demand.

recipes.name: Temp text channels
recipes.description: Per-feature temp text channels.

recipes.name: Temp voice channels
recipes.description: Click join-to-create voice channel.

recipes.name: Social alerts — default
recipes.description: Twitch/YouTube/Twitter live-and-post relays into a single announce channel.

recipes.name: RSS digest every Monday
recipes.description: Polls a list of RSS/Atom feeds throughout the week and posts a single combined digest every Monday morning. Items are deduplicated by canonical URL.

recipes.name: RSS — gaming niche pack
recipes.description: RSS feeds for gaming sites (PC Gamer, Polygon).

recipes.name: RSS — tech niche pack
recipes.description: RSS feeds for tech blogs (HN, Verge, ArsTechnica).

recipes.name: Twitch live alert with pinger role
recipes.description: Subscribes to one or more Twitch channels via EventSub. When a stream goes live, posts an embed in #stream-alerts and pings the StreamPings role. Auto-edits the message to past-tense once the stream ends, so the alert doesn't stay 'live' all night.

recipes.name: Twitch livestream pack
recipes.description: Auto-announces Twitch streams from the configured channels.

recipes.name: Twitch multistream pack
recipes.description: Watch multiple Twitch handles at once (gaming server style).

recipes.name: Twitter/X pack
recipes.description: Posts new tweets from the configured handle (rate-limited).

recipes.name: YouTube uploads pack
recipes.description: Posts new YouTube uploads.

recipes.name: Starboard — community
recipes.description: Low threshold, generous, NSFW board allowed.

recipes.name: Starboard — default
recipes.description: Standard 5-star threshold board in #starboard.

recipes.name: Dev soundbite board
recipes.description: Dev-channel only, 3-star threshold for funny dev quotes.

recipes.name: High threshold (10 stars)
recipes.description: Bumps threshold to 10 — only the rarest gems get pinned.

recipes.name: Mod-quote board
recipes.description: Dedicated board for star-pinned moderator messages.

recipes.name: NSFW board split
recipes.description: Routes NSFW posts to a separate starboard channel.

recipes.name: Allow self-stars
recipes.description: Authors can star their own posts.

recipes.name: Starboard with reaction-threshold ramp
recipes.description: Starboard with a self-tuning threshold: starts at 5 stars to be featured, raises by 1 each time the server crosses 1000 active members. Prevents the same handful of regulars from dominating once the community grows.

recipes.name: Starboard — strict
recipes.description: Higher threshold, NSFW blocked, only specific channels feed in.

recipes.name: Suggestions — community
recipes.description: Frictionless: instant post, free voting, generous limits.

recipes.name: Suggestions — default
recipes.description: Voting buttons, thread-per-suggestion, mod review.

recipes.name: Mod review required
recipes.description: Suggestions queue in a mod channel before going public.

recipes.name: Status tags pack
recipes.description: Adds standard pending/approved/denied/implemented tags.

recipes.name: Suggestions — strict
recipes.description: Mod review required before posting; cooldown 24h; cap 1 open.

recipes.name: Suggestion-to-thread pipeline
recipes.description: Turns every message in #suggestions into a discussion thread with up/down vote buttons, and re-posts top-voted suggestions of the week into a staff review channel.

recipes.name: Thread per suggestion
recipes.description: Each suggestion gets a discussion thread.

recipes.name: Time capsule — default
recipes.description: Sealed-message time capsules, mod-only seal, default 1y.

recipes.name: 5-year capsule window
recipes.description: Allows capsules up to 5 years out.

recipes.name: Auto-translate #general
recipes.description: Live auto-translation in #general for multilingual servers.

recipes.name: Translation — default
recipes.description: Per-channel auto-translate plus on-demand /translate.

recipes.name: Extra languages pack
recipes.description: Adds RU/ZH/KO/AR to the supported set.

recipes.name: Translation — multilingual server
recipes.description: Auto-translate active in main public channels; languages broadened.

recipes.name: TTS — default
recipes.description: On-demand text-to-speech in voice channels, member-triggerable, throttled.

recipes.name: Profanity filter on
recipes.description: Blocks slurs/hate words from being read aloud.

recipes.name: TTS — strict
recipes.description: Mods only, profanity filter on, short messages.

recipes.name: Friendly voice preset
recipes.description: Switches to the warm voice preset.

recipes.name: Consent-required clipping
recipes.description: Members must opt in via the consent role before they can be clipped.

recipes.name: Voice clipper — default
recipes.description: On-demand voice clip recorder.

recipes.name: Voice clipper — strict
recipes.description: Consent-required, mods only, transcript on.

recipes.name: Auto-transcript clips
recipes.description: Generates a text transcript alongside each clip.

recipes.name: Voice recording — default
recipes.description: Long-form VC recording, mod-trigger, consent-gated.

recipes.name: Podcast format
recipes.description: MP3 + speaker labels for podcast/recap recordings.

recipes.name: Webhook broadcaster — default
recipes.description: Outbound webhook broadcaster wired to mod-log.

recipes.name: Discord mirror
recipes.description: Mirrors selected events to another Discord server's webhook.

recipes.name: Form ↔ Notion via webhook
recipes.description: Pipes new form submissions (any Modly form) into a Notion database via outbound webhook. Maps each question to a Notion property and includes the submitter's Discord ID and a deep link back into the dashboard.

recipes.name: Notion relay
recipes.description: Posts form submissions to a Notion webhook.

recipes.name: Slack mirror
recipes.description: Mirrors mod actions to a Slack incoming webhook.

recipes.name: Welcome pool — anime
recipes.description: Anime/weeb welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: Anti-bot age-gate before access
recipes.description: Holds new joins in an unverified state until their account is at least N days old AND they pass a one-click human check. Blocks classic drive-by bot raids without forcing real users through CAPTCHA.

recipes.name: Welcome pool — art
recipes.description: Art-server welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: Boost celebration message
recipes.description: Posts a special embed in #announcements when someone boosts.

recipes.name: casual pool
recipes.description: Text snippet · casual-pool

recipes.name: Welcome — community
recipes.description: Warm community welcome with image card, member count, mention.

recipes.name: Welcome pool — cozy
recipes.description: Cozy-vibes welcome lines.

recipes.name: Welcome — default
recipes.description: Embed welcome message in #welcome with auto-role and 1-day reminder DM.

recipes.name: Welcome pool — dev
recipes.description: Developer-team-style welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: formal pool
recipes.description: Text snippet · formal-pool

recipes.name: Welcome pool — gaming
recipes.description: Gaming-flavoured welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: hype pool
recipes.description: Text snippet · hype-pool

recipes.name: Welcome image card
recipes.description: Switch from plain embed to a generated welcome image card.

recipes.name: Leave message
recipes.description: Posts a brief leave embed when a member leaves.

recipes.name: Multi-language welcome split
recipes.description: Routes the welcome message to a per-language channel based on the user's Discord locale. Falls back to a shared channel if locale is unsupported. Each language pulls from its own locale-keyed pool.

recipes.name: Onboarding recipe with quiz
recipes.description: Three-question onboarding quiz that gates access on correct answers about server rules. Wrong answers loop the question with a hint; final pass grants the MEMBER role and posts a celebration in #general.

recipes.name: 24-hour onboarding reminder
recipes.description: DM members 24h after join if they haven't sent a message yet.

recipes.name: Welcome — strict
recipes.description: No auto-role until verified; channel mention + reminder + DM included.

recipes.name: Welcome pool — study
recipes.description: Study-server welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: Welcome pool — tech
recipes.description: Tech-server welcome lines (i18n keys).

recipes.name: Welcome thread per join
recipes.description: Open a private welcome thread for each new member.

recipes.name: Tiered welcome with role picker
recipes.description: Two-step welcome: greet on join in #welcome with a button that posts a role-picker in a private thread. Once the user picks a role, they're moved to the MEMBER tier and the picker thread auto-archives.

recipes.name: warm pool
recipes.description: Text snippet · warm-pool

recipes.name: Welcome with 24h DM nudge if inactive
recipes.description: Standard public welcome plus a 24-hour follow-up DM if the new member hasn't posted in any channel by then. Big lift on activation rate without being naggy.
